creator: doon@inoc.net
text:
attempting to install Pear on new FreeBSD  install.  Pear just errors out, no useful debugging information

[portal:/usr/ports/devel/pear] make install 
===>  Installing for pear-1.9.4_1
===>   pear-1.9.4_1 depends on file: /usr/local/include/php/main/php.h - found
===>   pear-1.9.4_1 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/php/20090626-zts/xml.so - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if devel/pear already installed
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/devel/pear && make install
